name: Trail in Montsant - Circular from Ulldemolins
name_original: Trail por el Montsant - Circular desde Ulldemolins
region_intro: Jogging routes around Ulldemolins offer a diverse range of terrain within Catalonia's Priorat region. The area is situated in the Montsant river valley, framed by the rugged Montsant massif and the Serra de la Llena, providing varied elevation changes. Joggers can explore a landscape characterized by dramatic rock formations, deep gorges like Congost de Fraguerau, and the unique pools of El Toll de l'Ou. This natural setting provides a challenging yet rewarding environment for running. Best jogging routes around Ulldemolins The most popular jogging route is Trail in Montsant - Circular from Ulldemolins, a 10.6 miles (17.1 km) trail that takes 2 hours 30 minutes to complete. This difficult route traverses the rugged landscape of Montsant Natural Park. Another top favourite among local runners is Santa Magdalena d'Ulldemolins loop from Ulldemolins, a difficult 9.2 miles (14.9 km) path. This route explores the area around the notable Hermitage of Santa Magdalena d'Ulldemolins. Local runners also love the Toll de l'Ou Waterfalls – Roca Corbatera Summit loop from Ulldemolins, a 12.5 miles (20.1 km) trail leading through the scenic Barranc dels Pélags and past the unique El Toll de l'Ou, often completed in about 3 hours 1 minute. Jogging around Ulldemolins is defined by the rugged Montsant massif, the dramatic Congost de Fraguerau, and the tranquil Montsant River valley. The network offers options for easy, moderate, and difficult routes, catering to various ability levels. The routes in Ulldemolins are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.8 stars from more than 10 reviews. More than 1000 runners have used komoot to explore Ulldemolins's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many running routes are available around Ulldemolins?
A: There are nearly 100 dedicated running routes around Ulldemolins, offering a wide range of options for different skill levels and preferences. The majority of these, around 56, are classified as difficult, with 33 moderate and 1 easy route.

Q: What kind of terrain can I expect on jogging routes in Ulldemolins?
A: Jogging routes in Ulldemolins feature diverse terrain, from rugged mountain paths within the Montsant Natural Park to scenic trails along the Montsant River valley. You'll encounter dramatic rock formations, deep gorges like Congost de Fraguerau, and varied elevation changes, making for a challenging yet rewarding experience.

Q: Are there any circular running routes in Ulldemolins?
A: Yes, Ulldemolins offers several circular running routes. A notable option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e950328849/trail-in-montsant-circular-from-ulldemolins" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Trail in Montsant - Circular from Ulldemolins&lt;/a&gt;, which is a difficult 17.1 km trail traversing the rugged landscape of Montsant Natural Park.

Q: Can I find routes with waterfalls or unique natural features?
A: Absolutely. The region is known for its unique natural features. You can explore routes that lead to the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/843527" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Cadolles Fondes Deep Pools&lt;/a&gt; at the end of the Fraguerau gorge, or visit El Toll de l'Ou, a series of pools connected by small waterfalls. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/38154216" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Toll de l'Ou Waterfalls – Roca Corbatera Summit loop from Ulldemolins&lt;/a&gt; is a great option for this.

Q: What are some interesting landmarks or viewpoints I can see while running?
A: Many routes pass by significant landmarks and offer stunning views. You can run past hermitages like the notable &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/31446644" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Santa Magdalena d'Ulldemolins loop from Ulldemolins&lt;/a&gt;. Other highlights include the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/843525" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Hermitage of Sant Bartomeu de Fraguerau&lt;/a&gt;, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/4584288" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Priorat Balcony&lt;/a&gt;, and the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/632147" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Tossal de la Baltasana summit&lt;/a&gt;, which provide panoramic vistas of the Montsant massif and Serra de la Llena.

Q: Are there any easy jogging routes suitable for beginners?
A: While many routes in Ulldemolins are challenging, there is at least one easy jogging route available. For less strenuous options, look for routes described as having ample and comfortable forest tracks, which are ideal for a tranquil run.

Q: What do other runners say about the trails in Ulldemolins?
A: The running routes in Ulldemolins are highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 4.8 stars from over 15 reviews. More than 1000 runners have used komoot to explore the varied terrain, often praising the dramatic landscapes and the rewarding challenge of the trails.

Q: Are there any longer, more challenging running routes for experienced trail runners?
A: Yes, Ulldemolins is well-suited for experienced trail runners seeking a challenge. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/38151988" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Santa Magdalena d'Ulldemolins loop from Punta Pericana&lt;/a&gt; is a difficult 35.4 km route with significant elevation changes, perfect for a long and demanding run.

Q: Can I find routes that offer views of the surrounding villages?
A: Yes, some routes provide excellent views of nearby villages and the wider landscape. For example, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/31461763" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;View over Cornudella de Montsant – Roca Corbatera Summit loop from Albarca&lt;/a&gt; offers scenic vistas, including Cornudella de Montsant.

Q: What is the best time of year for jogging in Ulldemolins?
A: Ulldemolins offers a pleasant climate for jogging for much of the year. Spring and autumn generally provide the most comfortable temperatures for outdoor activities. Summers can be warm, especially at midday, while winters are mild but can have cooler mornings.

Q: Are there any routes that pass through gorges?
A: Yes, the region is famous for its gorges. Many routes, especially those within the Montsant Natural Park, will take you through spectacular areas like the Congost de Fraguerau, offering an immersive experience amidst dramatic rock formations and rich vegetation.

Santa Magdalena, called the Cathedral of Montsant, is a hermitage in the municipality of Ulldemolins (Priorat) protected as a cultural asset of local interest.
